# fragmentsStatus

**Instance Property**

Indicates if the media asset contains fragments or is extendable by fragments.

## Declaration

```swift
var fragmentsStatus: MEFileInfo.FragmentsStatus { get set }
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MEFileInfo/FragmentsStatus-swift.enum/couldNotContainFragments].

## Inspecting file properties

- **duration**: The duration of the media asset, if available.
- **MEFileInfo.FragmentsStatus**: An enumeration that describes if a media asset contains or supports fragments.

items.description: The duration of the media asset, if available.
